title: Progress — mark-complete + course completion
description: Self-paced progress tracking for belajar-with-rahmanef.com R5: an idempotent markLessonComplete mutation, derived-count progress reads, and idempotent courseCompletion (badge) creation when the final lesson lands. A user writes only their own completions (userId from ctx, never args — P0). No routes: the slice fills the courses barrel seams (LessonView.completionSlot, CourseOverview.progressSlot, SyllabusList.completedLessonIds). Reads the shared lessons/courses tables directly; never imports the courses feature.

profiles-public#9: courseCompletions written idempotently for the badge wall
